name: Proxy Execution via Pubprn
description: Detects the execution of `pubprn.vbs` with the `script:` argument, which is indicative of an attempt to proxy the execution of a malicious payload. Attackers may use this technique to bypass application control or other security measures.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Sysmon Event ID for Process Creation (1).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that was executed, which should be 'pubprn.vbs'.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line used to execute 'pubprn.vbs', including the 'script:' argument and the embedded script.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which 'pubprn.vbs' was executed.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.
